_shorthelp: GridColumn Adds a column to a GridRow. Bootstrap.

_size-xs.desc: Size of column in extra small layout (<576px). Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-sm.desc: Size of column in small layout (<576px). Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-md.desc: Size of column in medium layout (≥768). Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-lg.desc: Size of column in large layout (≥992). Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-xl.desc: Size of column in extra large layout (≥1200). Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_csstemplate: #{id} {{{if _parent.position<>'static'}position:{_parent.position};{/if}{if display<>''} display:{display};{/if}{if left<>'' and left<>'auto'} left:{left!p};{/if}{if right<>'' and right<>'auto'} right:{right!p};{/if}{if top<>'' and top<>'auto'} top:{top!p};{/if}{if bottom<>'' and bottom<>'auto'} bottom:{bottom!p};{/if}{if height<>'' and height<>'auto'} height:{height!p};{/if}{if width<>'' and width<>'auto'} width:{width!p};{/if}}}
_htmltemplate: "<div id='{id}' style='{_flexboxcss!i}{_fontcss!i}{_margincss!i}{_paddingcss!i}{_colorscss!i}{_bordercss!i}{hidden}{style!j}'  class='col-{size-xs} col-sm-{size-sm} col-md-{size-md} col-lg-{size-lg} col-xl-{size-xl} {class}'>",
